diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Entry point for Hono framework exports
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoRouter, default, init
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, hono.ts, utils/types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Main index file that bundles all Hono exports including router, utils and core classes
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports const Hono as default class, Router, init function; all module exports centralized from ./hono
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type definitions for Env, Handlers, Context, Request, Hono
+- Internal names noticed: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Context, Request, Hono, Route, Method, HTTPMethod
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for entire Hono ecosystem including environment, handlers, context, request, and response types
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Env, HandlerTypes, HTTPMethod, StatusCode, JSONValue, Context, Route, Input, Hono, PathVariables, TypedResponse, Next, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, ValidationTargets, E, I, I extends Request
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class with route handling and app composition
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, router, default, init, get, post, put, delete, patch, options, use, all
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, utils/types.ts, utils/cookie.ts, compose.ts, http-exception.ts, adapters
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono application class that manages routing, middleware composition, and request handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Class constructor takes router, app methods (get/post/etc) bind to router routes, addRoute registers path with router, mountApp delegates to init, handle uses compose middleware, errorHandler uses HTTPException, default exports Hono class
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Base Hono class with routing and middleware infrastructure
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, router, ROUTER_METHODS, router, match, notFoundHandler, simpleRoutes, methods, path, routerOptions, router, routerPath
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, types/handler.ts, types/http-exception.ts, hono.ts, router/index.ts, router/reg-exp-compact-router, router/node/router.ts, router/path-to-regexp-async/router.ts, utils/resolve-path.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Base implementation providing router integration and middleware chain handling for all Hono applications
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends Hono with appMethod routing registration, match routes to requests, notFoundHandler returns 404, simpleRoutes array stores direct route methods, addRoute registers with router at path, setBasePath merges base path, mountApp merges sub-app routes, handle initializes compose middleware, onError sets global error handler, setErrorHandler sets HTTPException handler, router integration via constructor options
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class representing request context with response control
+- Internal names noticed: Context, c, res, var, get, set, new Response, getVar, setVar, getHeader, setHeader, getBody
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, compose.ts, http-exception.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Handles request lifecycle, manages response headers/body, provides access to variables and execution context
+- Copy-safe detail: Constructor receives Request and optional execution context, res property initialized as new Response(), var stores key-value pairs, getVar/reVar/setVar manage variables, getHeader/setHeader manage headers, getBody sets body, exec stores next handler, newResponse creates new response object replace current, getResponseError returns error response, getError returns error object, setDefaultHandler sets default handler, setRequest sets request object, getResponseValue returns response data, setResponseValue sets response data, getVarOrReturnDefault returns var or default
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class wrapping native Request
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, bodyCache, raw, path, url, method, param, query, queries, header, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, parseBody, valid, addValidatedData, cloneRawRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/body.ts, types.ts, constants.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Wraps web Request to add Hono-specific routing, caching, and body handling methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends HonoRequest with bodyCache for body parsing, exports cloneRawRequest helper, has methods for all body types (json, text, blob, formData), param/query/queries for URL parameters, header for request headers, url/method properties, addValidatedData for custom validation, cloneRawRequest reconstructs consumed request body, GET_MATCH_RESULT uses symbol to store match result
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: Type and const definitions for routing constants
+- Internal names noticed: METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, methods, ROUTER_METHODS, methodFromKind, allMethods, method
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Routing constants defining HTTP methods and method mapping for router integration
+- Copy-safe detail: exports const METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE as string (lowercase name for all-method), methods const as string array of HTTP methods, ROUTER_METHODS exports router compatible method strings, methodFromKind function maps HTTP method to router method, allMethods const as string array, method const as string constant, exports all methods, methodFromKind function to map HTTP method
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: Body utilities for parsing form data and URL-encoded bodies
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body based on content type, handles form data, URL-encoded data, and form-encoded data
+- Copy-safe detail: parseBody function main export handles multipart/form-data or application/x-www-form-urlencoded content types, parseFormData parses form data, convertFormDataToBodyData handles all/dot options for form data parsing, handleParsingAllValues handles multi-value form fields as arrays, handleParsingNestedValues handles dot-notation keys, exports BodyData types and ParseBodyOptions interface
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: Middleware composition utility
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index, middleware, onError, onNotFound, context, next
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, context.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Composes multiple middleware functions into single middleware using index tracking and dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: compose function takes array of [middleware, param] or single middleware, accepts onError and onNotFound handlers, returns composed middleware function, uses closure for dispatch function, index tracks current middleware index, dispatch function called with index 0, dispatch checks if i <= index throws error, handler assignment for current middleware or next/undefined, try/catch handler execution with onError fallback, context finalization check, returns context object
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class for structured HTTP errors
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, res, status, HTTPExceptionOptions, options, message, cause, Response, getResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Class extending Error to throw structured HTTP errors with status code and response body
+- Copy-safe detail: class HTTPException extends Error, constructor takes status code (defaults to 500) and optional options, options property can have res, message, cause, status becomes class property, getResponse method creates Response from stored res or generates new Response with message and status, throws this.message with cause if available and no pre-built response, returns Response or undefined
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono client entry point
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: client.ts, utils, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Module re-exporting all client-side API surface including client creation and response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: exports hc function from ./client, exports parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils, exports types including InferResponseType, InferRequestType Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function for creating type-safe HTTP client
+- Internal names noticed: hc, createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, ClientRequestOptions, Client, ClientRequest, ValidationTargets, BuildSearchParamsFn, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, WebSocket
+- Imports or neighbor types: types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Factory function to create proxied HTTP client interface with typed routes, methods, and request/response handling
+- Copy-safe detail: hc function creates proxy wrapping callback function, callback receives path array and args, createProxy function creates proxy objects based on path and arguments, ClientRequestImpl class handles http requests with body/query/ params, fetch method on ClientRequestImpl builds URL, merges params and query strings, attaches body if method not GET/HEAD, calls fetch with built request, exports hc as default, hc returns proxy cast to Client type, createProxy takes callback and creates nested proxy structure, proxy access handler checks for then/apply, apply handler builds callback args with path, ClientRequestImpl private properties for url/method/buildSearchParams/queryParams/pathParams/rBody/cType
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client type system for typed APIs
+- Internal names noticed: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType InferEndpointType InferRequestOptionsType, Hono, HonoBase, Endpoint, Schema, ExtractSchema METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode ServerErrorStatusCode, UnionToIntersection, IsLiteral, TrimStartSlash TrimEndSlash BuildPath BuildPathname HonoURL TypedURL, BuildTypedURL ApplyParam BuildSearch IsEmptyObject, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode PickResponseByStatusCode PickSchema
+- Plain-English summary: Full type definitions for Hono client including types for schemas, endpoints, requests, responses, paths, URLs, and status-code filtering
+- Copy-safe detail: exports client index and types, BuildSearchParamsFn function type for custom query serialization, Callback and CallbackOptions for proxy invocation, ClientRequest type defines per-route request with params/query/headers/body, ClientRequestOptions with fetch function and init option, ClientResponse interface with body/headers/status/clone/text/json methods, Fetch function signature for client calls, InferResponseType extracts response type from fetch call, InferRequestType extracts request args from fetch call, InferRequestOptionsType extracts request options, InferEndpointType extracts endpoint metadata, BuildTypedURL builds typed URL from protocol/host/port/path/query, HonoURL and BuildPath provide URL and path utilities, ApplyParam replaces path params with values, IsLiteral checks if type is not generic string, UnionToIntersection utility for type logic, TrimStartSlash/TrimEndSlash path utilities, BuildSearch builds query string, BuildPathname builds path, BuildPath combines path and search, TypedURL extends URL with typed properties, ExpandAllMethod expands $all to all methods, ClientRequest ties method to expanded endpoint, ClientRequestOptions with nested headers option, ExtractSchema extracts Route[] schema from Hono app, METHODS type of http method strings, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE type for $all string, StandardMethods type for prefixed methods, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode filters by status code, PickResponseByStatusCode picks specific status codes, PickRoute filters routes by status, ApplyGlobalResponse applies custom response types, ModRoute modifies route with response types, ModSchema modifies schema, PathToChain builds client path structure, type Client conditional on HonoBase schema, ObjectType utility type
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: Utility functions for URL and query manipulation
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, deepMergeFlat, isObject
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English speech summary: Helper functions for merging paths/objects and building query parameters from objects
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath concatenates two paths with proper slash normalization, replaceUrlParam replaces :param placeholders using regex, buildSearchParams converts plain object to URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol swaps http/ws or ws/http in URL, removeIndexString removes /index from URL, deepMerge utility uses isObject to detect objects then recurses, isObject checks type and null and not array, deepMergeFlat not currently used but present, all functions return or transform input values, buildSearchParams appends arrays as multi-key params, replaceUrlParam creates regex per param key
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: Smart fetch result parser and error wrapper
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, Response, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: client/types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Parses fetch Response into usable data, throws structured DetailedError on error responses, auto-detects response format
+- Copy-safe detail: fetchRP async function accepts Response or Promise<Response), resolves Promise, detects response type by content-type header, compares against nullBodyResponses (101, 204, 205, 304), parses body using detectResponseType result, accesses _data if _data already exists, checks !res.ok condition, throws DetailedError if not ok with status and detail, detectResponseType checks content-type header, tries application/*json or text/*, returns 'json' or 'text', DetailedError extends Error with name 'DetailedError', has detail/code/log/statusCode public properties, DetailedError constructor accepts m
